title: Very Loyal Tridents
description: A severed mod which contains all of Enchantify's accurate trident slot return features as a separate project.
body:
![very_loyal_tridents](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9e3e6bfc56efc280ea4c457dc7833cff8d558e21.png)

Very Loyal Tridents (or VLT) is a mod which makes tridents return to the exact slot they were thrown from, making offhanding trident a viable weapon alongside more convience in using tridents as a projectile. Everything in this mod is built into Enchantify, however this mod was made to allow for the trident changes to be used independently.

# QNA

A quick questionaire and explaination for some stuff regarding this mod and others. 

**Q: How can I tell you guys if there are any bugs?**

A: The link to our discord is right on this page, just join and contact one of us and let us know. We want to make sure our mods are bug-free.

**Q: Am I good to add or show this in my modpack/video?**

A: 100%, you don't need permission either, the only ask is that when our mod is included in a video that we are credited or a link to the mod is provided.

**Q: Will this mod be updated to newer versions/backported to older ones?**

A: Yes. This project will be updated ahead of most of our other projects, such as Enchantify, because of how light it is. However, if we have not ported this mod to a version that is inbetween versions we've already covered then there is a low likelyhood those will be revisited.
